title: The 22nd Birthday
opening: Deep inside a tiny pixel forest, the trees whispered softly under the stars.
Every year, this forest waited for one special day.
A day when 22 little stars would appear between the leaves.
And every feeling pointed to one person...
Tonight, the forest is waiting for her to find all 22 stars.
When the final star is found, the birthday sky will shine again.
ending: The 22 stars returned to the forest sky.
The flowers opened under the moonlight.
And finally, the birthday star appeared.
